workflow.title: Start with the idea
workflow.description: Filter through: useful over hype? Can one person ship it? Worth teaching in public?

workflow.title: Build with Cursor
workflow.description: Project rules keep the AI on brand. Composer for features, agent for exploration.

workflow.title: Ship the smallest useful thing
workflow.description: Static first, API only when content must be live. One Docker image to deploy.

workflow.title: Teach in public
workflow.description: Post the process on X — hook, workflow, what shipped, what I learned, artifacts.

cursorRules.title: Minimal scope
cursorRules.description: Smallest correct diff. No unrelated changes, no over-engineering.

cursorRules.title: Match conventions
cursorRules.description: Read surrounding code first. Reuse patterns — additions should look native.

cursorRules.title: Document in docs_and_changelog
cursorRules.description: New features and changes get a doc in the project docs folder.

cursorRules.title: Ship, don't perfect
cursorRules.description: Useful tests only. Comments for non-obvious logic. Bias toward shipping.
